plugins.name: clockify-mcp
plugins.description: [v0.6.0] Clockify time tracking — 6-month JWT TTL (authorise once per half-year, not daily) + always-warm Cloud Run (no more transport drops) + assertive 20-min nudge with macOS notification + daily calendar reconciliation + auto-evolving project mappings. Universal rules: quarter-hour-aligned starts, 15-min quantum, never double-books the same customer.
